meta.title: Strain DSM 6035 is the type strain of Lactobacillus panis (Wiese et al. 1996). Opinion 72
authors: Judicial Commission of the International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes,
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: The Judicial Commission of the International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes decided that strain DSM 6035 is the type strain of Lactobacillus panis with the consequence that the name Lactobacillus panis has been validly published.
